title: gilia nudicaulis
intro: Gilia nudicaulis, also known as sticky gilia or sticky gilias, is a flowering plant species in the phlox family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to aid in cough relief. Gilia nudicaulis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential uses.
